programme.desc: Daniel and Miss Elaina learn that it's okay to like different things, but they should always be kind.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Fixing X

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Fairy House/ Pinkabotta & Peterbotta

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Patisserie

programme.title: Nature: Nature's Biggest Beasts

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Forgiving Rollins
programme.desc: Atlanta's Deputy Chief, Charles Patton, and his newest detective, Reese Taymor, visit New York for a law enforcement conference. When Reese is found unconscious in her hotel room, she cries rape at the scene but changes her story soon afterwards.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Padre Sandunguero

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Decaying Morality

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Intimidation Game
programme.desc: When a female employee is assaulted at a gamer convention, Detective Tutuola investigates the crime. A female game developer refuses to delay her game launch, and the cops must 'level up' to protect her.

programme.title: WWE NXT

programme.title: Modern Family: My Funky Valentine
programme.desc: Phil and Claire break from their traditional Valentine's Day dinner date and plan a little roleplay excursion. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria's ideas of romance clash when he takes her to a comedy show, and Mitchell and Cameron play Cupid for Manny.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fears

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pattern Seventeen

programme.title: Movie: Naughty or Nice
programme.desc: A young woman receives a mysterious package at her door, which contains a 'Naughty or Nice' book that reveals the good and bad about everyone in her life.

programme.title: Movie: A Bride for Christmas

programme.title: South Park: Crème Fraiche

programme.title: South Park: A Ladder to Heaven

programme.title: South Park: South Park Is Gay!
programme.desc: The boys are hot to be gay once the metrosexual craze hits South Park. Meanwhile, Mr. Garrison accuses the Queer Eye guys of selling out.

programme.title: South Park: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The children of South Park are drawn to 'Mr. Jefferson,' the new neighbour in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get 'Mr. Jefferson' to love him best.

programme.title: South Park: It Hits the Fan
programme.desc: When the HBC Network allows a show to utter curse words on the air, it threatens to destroy the world. It's up to the Knights of Standards and Practices, as well as Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny, to censor the airwaves and save the world.

programme.title: South Park: Season Finale
programme.desc: The citizens of South Park have had enough of Randy and Tegridy Farms and they just want to lock him up.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mystery in the Closet

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cloning the Woolly Mammoth
programme.desc: To help clone the extinct woolly mammoth back to life, Josh Gates visits the Korean biotech lab driving the project and excavates ancient bones in a working Canadian gold mine. He then descends into a vast sinkhole in Siberia to unearth frozen DNA.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Journey to the Ice Age
programme.desc: To find a viable sample of mammoth DNA, Josh Gates retrieves bone samples from the massive Batagay Crater. He then journeys far upriver to a site in the lawless Siberian wilderness where tusk hunters carve out troves of bones from the permafrost.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Scotland
programme.desc: John joins treasure hunters in the Scottish Highlands chasing a lead on a lost cache of gold that was hidden after the Jacobite Uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Atlantis of the Andes
programme.desc: Josh dives into a mystery below South America's Lake Titicaca. During the investigation, Josh discovers multiple structures of the ancient Tiwanaku people including ruins hidden in the lake's depths, dubbed 'the Atlantis of the Andes.'

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to India in search of a mythical kingdom.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Beyond The Secret
programme.desc: Josh Gates traverses the US to uncover the mysteries of The Secret.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Butch Cassidy's Lost Loot
programme.desc: Josh immerses himself in Wild West lore on a quest to find Butch Cassidy's missing money. He traces the iconic outlaw's footsteps through Colorado, Utah and Nevada, eventually learning that he may need to find the man himself to locate the lost loot.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: With summer winding down, shiners are doubling their efforts to turn a quick profit. Tim Smith traverses the Atlantic on his quest to dominate the international shine market, but his pitch could be lost in translation.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Caved In
programme.desc: After coming to blows with Bill, Josh fears he may have finally gone too far. Patti and David aim to make up for lost time with a scorching new brew, but alarm bells have them running for the hills.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: It's the final weeks of summer and shiners are putting it all on the line. Tim must create a way to fill a massive international order and its judgment day in Virginia as Tickle puts on a brave face for court.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shine 'Til You Drop
programme.desc: The stakes get higher as shine season nears its end. Mark and Digger leave disaster behind for a new still site as Patti and David's jalapeno whiskey drives them to sell in unfamiliar territory.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Still Regretting
programme.desc: Josh is down his right hand and his right hand man. Snags at the distillery have production at a halt and Tim's future in jeopardy. Chico and Sandra set out on horseback for some mountain shining. Patti and David rush to run before hunting season begins.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Virgin Whiskey
programme.desc: Chico and Sandra are anxious to get back in the saddle and make their first run. Tim's behemoth tank might not be the ticket to fulfilling the Poland order after all. With Jim Tom by his side, Josh churns out a family heritage spirit.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Surthrive
programme.desc: An independent mother of three, plus a jungle savvy Green Beret, take on the remote wetlands of Guyana. Battling disease-carrying sand flies, venomous snakes, and an infestation of caiman present huge challenges.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: A special ops vet teams up with a single mom to fight torrential rains, flash floods and sickness in Thailand's Sai Rung River Valley. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before the river leaves them stranded from the crew.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A self-taught survivalist and an impulsive black belt take on the arid lakebeds of Nicaragua. The environment features a variety of deadly predators, but when one of them fails to pull their weight, it becomes clear their worst enemy could be each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Arachnid Overload
programme.desc: A survival-savvy yoga teacher and a custom knife maker tackle the brutal jungle of Colombia. Their primitive survival skills are impressive, but the deadly spiders and tics test both their courage and resilience, threatening to take them down.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a Special Forces veteran risk hypothermia at every turn as they take on Canada with no clothes. Bitter cold, torrential rain and wandering bears and moose make every night a struggle, and an obstinate chipmunk pushes their patience.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Edge of Madness
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on the hellish conditions of Guyana's equatorial savannah. Slammed from day one by the heat, they battle debilitating health issues, a team dynamic breakdown, critical survival malfunctions and a massive psychological decline.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Princess for a Day
programme.desc: Diva Latoya wants to walk down the aisle in a blinged-out ball gown. After months of chemo and currently cancer-free, Kristin is ready to marry her high school sweetheart.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Together as One
programme.desc: Meighan and Christina represent the newest kind of American family.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Taryn is a young bride who can't wait to buy a wedding dress. Denise has returned to the salon after four years to try on her wedding dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Rocker Brides
programme.desc: Kristin wants to find a rock 'n' roll, edgy wedding dress, while Lindsey, who's all about leather and lace, surprisingly decides on a softer wedding dress look.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Extreme Entourage
programme.desc: Melissa is a headpiece consultant at the store who is shopping for her wedding dress. Stella is having a Greek wedding and has brought along a big entourage. Carli is returning to the store for her final fitting after a challenging dress selection.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Family Rules
programme.desc: Tanya brings her outspoken family to help her find a blush-coloured dress. Mary Beth, who has ovarian cancer, is excited to dress shop with three generations of family members. Stella decides to bring only her mother to her first fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Cheetah Bride
programme.desc: Sabrina Bryan of 'The Cheetah Girls' has a dress-shopping date with designer Hayley Paige and one of Kleinfeld's own consultants is going to be a bride herself!

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Destinee's Story
programme.desc: Born as 'Matthew', Destinee never felt like she fit in. Now, having come out as a 600-pound transgender woman, she likes her curves, but she will need to say goodbye to them if she wants to be approved to transition completely.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: You're Not Taking My Kids

programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Back to the Big Dig
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reboots a living skeleton, an instant pet trap, a flipping mermaid and more, all with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Footloose
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q, and Sal call out bizarre names while working the front desk of an office, and tonight's loser gets up close and personal with some strange feet.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Breakfast for Dinner, South of the Border
programme.desc: Rachael shows that breakfast for dinner doesn't have to mean pancakes and scrambled eggs. She whips up crave-worthy chilaquiles with a rich, red chile sauce made with Guajillo peppers for a satisfying kick.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Egg-zactly What You Want
programme.desc: Rachael makes Shaksouka, which is easier to make than it is to say. This savory Middle Eastern dish of tomatoes and eggs is typically served for breakfast, but the combination of spices, jalapeno and chipotle make it a hearty meal any time of day.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Comfort Food, Quick
programme.desc: Rachael skips the fuss of making a traditional chicken pot pie by whipping up her easy, stove-top version in half the time. She tops it with golden pieces of puff pastry for a fast and pretty finish to this bowl of comfort.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Roses Are Red, Vodka Sauce Is Pink!
programme.desc: Rachael proves that it pays to perfect the classics with this shrimp pasta and vodka sauce. Her easy sauce is both simple and sumptuous and adding shrimp elevates it to the perfect meal for a date night.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Don't Get Curried Away
programme.desc: The best thing about Rachael's chicken curry in a hurry with basmati is the homemade curry mix. She seizes the opportunity to experiment with curry flavor by making her own spice blend instead of using a store-bought one.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Have a Ball
programme.desc: Rachael's roasted meatballs with garlic bread taste just like Grandma used to make, but they come together in just 30 minutes. Rachael adds crusty, buttery garlic bread for an unbeatable home-cooked meal.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cleaning Out The Fridge
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cleaning out her fridge and using up food that's on its way out. She's turning milk and cream into a wonderful lemon rice pudding with leftover lemons, while the produce drawer is transformed into a cool, delicious fridge gazpacho.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Happy Birthday, Ladd
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking up a celebration dinner for her husband, Ladd's, birthday. There are delicious chili cheese burgers, crisp thin fries, a cowboy-friendly wedge salad with parmesan peppercorn ranch dressing and a towering yellow cake.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Dodo of the North
programme.desc: Forrest travels to the Faroe Islands to look for any trace of the Great Auk. The search takes him through some of the most scenic and rugged terrain he's ever attempted in his passionate search for a large flightless seabird that has been long forgotten.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Galapagos Giant
programme.desc: Forrest is in the Galapagos seeking the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal that was only seen once, over 100 years ago. The clues are here, along with an abundance of incredibly unique species, raising hopes of a historic discovery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Dracula Monkey of Borneo

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Legendary Cape Lion
programme.desc: Forrest ventures home to Zimbabwe in search of the mysterious Cape Lion, a massive black-maned predator. He and the crew navigate the African bush determined to get DNA proof, facing threats of charging rhinos and huge prides of lions.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Recovered Evidence: White Wolf of Newfoundland
programme.desc: Featuring all-new footage from Forrest's expeditions. Forrest teams up with a specialist in Newfoundland in search of the White Wolf, a predator that was declared extinct in 1930. They meet with a hunter that shot what is believed to be a wolf.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Caribbean Monk Seal
programme.desc: Forrest sets off on a dangerous, shark-infested search for the extinct Caribbean monk seal. To prove its existence, he and the crew descend into deep waters where they come face-to-face with a giant tiger shark.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Air Force

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Marines
programme.desc: In round three, four Marines attempt to forge the KA-BAR, having to adapt and overcome metals from a massive anchor, using the San Mai technique. The two who move on must forge a weapon that represents their branch: the Marine Corps Officers Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Navy

programme.title: Info-Documentaries
programme.desc: Informational programming.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bare Bones
programme.desc: A man brings in a collection of Mazon Creek fossils that are hundreds of millions of years old. The Pawn Stars stumble across a Down and Dirty custom motorcycle frame.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Monkey Business
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars take aim at a hat believed to have been worn by movie legend John Wayne. An etching that may have been done by Rembrandt and a classic 1950s clapping chimp are also up for grabs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Over the Top
programme.desc: A World War One helmet blasts into the shop. Corey and Rick are presented with a gun holster used on the long running TV show Gunsmoke.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bear-ly There
programme.desc: The team sets their sights on an 1870 Volcanic pistol. A World War II gas mask is found. An early 1900s life-sized Steiff bear prowls into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Close, But No Cigar
programme.desc: Ask not what your Pawn Stars can do for you, when the guys get a chance to own JFK's personal cigar box.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: The guys check out a collection of sex education records from 1948. Then, Corey and Chumlee check out a 'blue book' from the Las Vegas Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ponies and Phonies
programme.desc: Rick and Corey attempt to rope in a Bible believed to have been carried by Pony Express riders. Then, Corey attempts to get an R2D2 Pepsi machine that comes in the shop. Later, Lili's internship is up and the guys need to review her performance.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Chum System
programme.desc: A nightstick thought to have belonged to Ulysses S. Grant arrives at the shop. Then, Corey and Chum check out a vintage skateboard sticker collection. Chumlee tries to prove he is a master at multitasking.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Capture the Pawn
programme.desc: A rare 1589 book with the instructions for war and fortification, an 1840s chess table, a pair of antique door knockers, and a 1800s experimental rifle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of Fire
programme.desc: A model train once owned by Johnny Cash chugs into the shop, and a 1920s chicken incubator clucks on in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Napoleon Complex
programme.desc: A letter signed by Napoleon, a surreal Pedro Friedeberg figure, a 1960s Monkees talking puppet, and some original 'Dick & Jane' illustrations.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Every Rose Has Its Pawn
programme.desc: An original sketch of the Marine Corps War Memorial; a Poison platinum disc signed by Bret Michaels; a Roman oil lamp from the first century lights its way in; a Military certificate from the Vietnam War.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Samurai
programme.desc: Three Japanese samurai swords have Chum trying to cut a great deal. Corey pursues a Steiff donkey pull toy, while Rick looks over a British WWII propaganda poster and some significant thank-you letters.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Great Scott!
programme.desc: Rick receives an offer on a 1973 Marshall amp, with all of the original parts intact. A hoverboard signed by the cast of the 'Back to the Future' sequel floats into the shop towards Corey and Chumlee.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: President's Day Sale
programme.desc: Rick is after an autographed card of President Abraham Lincoln. Corey and Chum consider paying a hefty sum for a President Bill Clinton designed golf driver shaft, until discovering that he may not have used it himself.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawned and Confused
programme.desc: A seller brings his Led Zeppelin vinyl collection to Rick and Chum. A fancy 19th century office desk may be a worthwhile buy. A game-used base from the 2016 World Series could be a home run for the guys. Rick takes a trip to see 'The Object.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Who's Pawning With Me!
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee test out an old school 1960s Dune Buggy. Then, Rick jives with an original Jackson Five autograph that makes its way into the store. Plus, Chumlee drafts a new shop mission statement when he checks out props from 'Jerry Maguire'.

programme.title: Jessie: What a Steal
programme.desc: In an effort to help Ravi make friends, Jessie takes him to a MENSA meeting in the park. However, their new friends, Madeline and Scott, may be too good to be true.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part One
programme.desc: While on vacation, the Ross family finds a girl stranded in the middle of the ocean and invites her aboard their yacht. Meanwhile, Bertram stays home and babysits Mrs. Kipling, who has separation anxiety from Ravi.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Build a Sled?
programme.desc: When Charlotte backs out of their annual “Snowling” tradition for a sleepover with her friends, Cami sets out to sabotage her sister's sleepover.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dream Moms

programme.title: Jessie: Where's Zuri?
programme.desc: Stewart gets a new manny and when he clashes with Jessie she stops the play dates between Zuri and Stewart.

programme.title: Jessie: Spaced Out

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sweet 16-A-Rooney

programme.desc: Liv volunteers to supervise Parker's sleepover in hopes of reconnecting with him once she realizes just how much he's grown while she was away. Meanwhile, Maddie and Willow work on a school project, and Joey and Pete go on a road trip to Pastrami Palace.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Gone Girl

programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Joker In the Pack

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Married to the Job
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda and his officers are facing off against a barricaded gunman when he gets an emergency call from his wife. Kathy winds up overhearing him being shot at, leading her to grapple with the terrifying realities of being married to a cop.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly. Then, when a college student is strangled in his home, Lt. Kenda must figure out which of his roommates is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Trigger

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cradle to the Grave

programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide City: Society Hill Slaying
programme.desc: When Philadelphia jewelers Patty and Richard Zimmerman are found executed in their Society Hill townhome, police suspect a robbery gone wrong. But, when they discover nothing has been taken, they realize the motive may be far more sinister.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Murder Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Police find a cast of dangerous characters and uncover a heinous plot in the murder of a single mother.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Killer Chemistry
programme.desc: Professor Tiffany Maher is a faculty favorite; intelligent and sociable, it's hard to believe that she could have any enemies. But when Tiffany is murdered, investigators discover a secret online life that may lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Texts and Threats
programme.desc: After losing his dream girl to an older guy, Seath Jackson launches into a bitter social media war with his ex and her new man. Soon after, Seath disappears. Detectives work to find out if this is a runaway case or something more serious.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: Murder on His Mind
programme.desc: Stephen Stanko is accused of brutal crimes committed in a violent spree so atrocious that it left two people dead and a girl pleading for her life in a desperate 911 call. But Stephen claims that a brain defect propelled him to commit the crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dangerous Beauty
programme.desc: An investigation into death of a Washington man and the trail that leads to Peggy Sue Thomas, a one-time Ms. Washington.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation in Texas
programme.desc: Investigate the death of a businessman with a taste for bondage and the overriding question of whether he was killed by an intruder, someone he loved or by his own hand.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Brother vs. Brother
programme.desc: Two brothers run a lucrative snow removal business. But one of them grows devoted to a spiritual group and its enigmatic guru; while the other finds a more illicit path to enlightenment. The only thing that can stop this family feud is murder.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Suburban Nightmare
programme.desc: A group of suburban teens invite a much-older, rougher young man into their inner circle. They're hoping for thrills and cash. But when these two worlds collide, the crashing result is a murder so vicious and gruesome it haunts the community to this day.

programme.title: Broken Trust: In-Law, Outlaw
programme.desc: A California real estate agent gives in to his wife's wish that her mother moves in with the couple, and their kids. But what begins as a compassionate gesture turns into a bitter war of wills between husband, wife and mother-in-law leading to bloodshed.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Home Protection
programme.desc: Signe Edwards is a true-blue Texan. But when an injury forces her off the saddle, she relies on a series of handymen and sketchy online acquaintances for help around the house. One of them will betray her in the most horrific way.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions

programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Christiansburg House
programme.desc: The team travels down the road to Christiansburg to salvage an old home. They get some good meat and potatoes from the house, including the mantles, banisters and all the gingerbread trim. Also, Mike and Tay build a couch that can fit a Whiteside.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former United Methodist Church
programme.desc: The crew head to Laurel, Delaware to salvage what they can from a former Methodist church that fell victim to water damage. The team removes pews, a bronze bell, and a greenhouse skylight before heading back to the shop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former Dixie Furniture Plant
programme.desc: The team travel to a vacant furniture plant in Lexington, NC, where they work in near-darkness salvaging conveyor belts, fire doors, veneer molds, factory carts, and industrial lights.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Texas Tavern Sign
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work at home in Roanoke, Virginia, where they salvage a sign for the Texas Tavern and learn the history of the local restaurant over burgers and bowls of chili.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cosby Brothers Mill
programme.desc: Mike and Robert give Tay a history lesson with an old dentistry x-ray machine before the team loads up for a project in Grottoes, VA. They start at Cosby Brothers Mill where they hope to salvage some old mill parts.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Saving a Gem
programme.desc: The crew finds a gem with a log cabin tucked inside an old farmhouse, but they struggle to disassemble and demo the property due to the ever-increasing mud. They must also meticulously document the placement of each beam, board and panel.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lerner House
programme.desc: The crew travels to Orange, VA to salvage a 1930s brick mansion, including its columns and windows. Mike and Robert return General George C. Marshall's door to the Virginia Military Institute. Tay and Mike build a coffee table from a door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Esther Ludwig Mansion
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage travels to Pennsylvania to save what they can from Esther Ludwig's mansion before it gets demolished. They hope to reclaim some of the mansion's all-original items, such as chandeliers, built-ins and mantles.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Mansion
programme.desc: Brett thinks he finally gets an easy restoration job on a stunning Spanish Colonial hillside mansion until he finds out it has a pink Victorian kitchen. Then he uncovers hidden treasure on the old woodwork but the homeowners don't share his excitement.

programme.title: Restored: Restoring a Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Restoration expert Brett Waterman is hired to restore a 1913 Arts and Crafts bungalow. This 100 year-old home has experienced incomplete renovations and numerous bad choices over the years. Brett rediscovers the home's history and architectural features.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Restored: 1947 Postmodern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1947 postmodern ranch back to its post-World War II style for a military veteran and his wife. However, he has to make some tough decisions when the homeowners want to get rid of the original kitchen tile.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Revival
programme.desc: Brett restores a classic Spanish Colonial Revival that hasn't been touched in years because the owner is a professional musician who is always on the road. He must make the kitchen and bath functional while staying true to the home's character.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1913 craftsman bungalow for a young couple with a baby on the way. He's challenged with finding a way to bring back the natural wood in the house while still making it bright and welcoming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Nicole's doing a surprise home renovation for one of her carpenters, Bobby, and his family. Bobby and Karen started renovating their house two years ago, but their daughter was diagnosed with cancer and they turned their focus to her.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Tessa and her family are coming home soon, and Nicole needs to finish their surprise home renovation before they do. She tackles the laundry room and hallway in the back addition of Bobby and Karen's house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Nicole finds her home in Minnesota to be flooded from burst pipes due to the extreme cold. She and her crew try to discover where all they leak are located in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitschy Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole tackles her grandparents' kitchen. Built in 1956, the kitchen has been around for over half a century, but was redone in the '90s, eliminating its mid-century modern charm. Nicole wants to restore the kitchen to how it looked when she was a child.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Pool Room Refresher
programme.desc: For Nicole's next project, it's gonna be sink or swim! The indoor pool that Nicole's grandfather built by hand is getting a much-needed refresher. First up, the safety and mechanical systems of the pool need to be overhauled.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: All About Family
programme.desc: Off the pool lies a dated family room, covered in wood paneling and boasting a large mechanical room for the pool equipment. Nicole sees opportunity for a beautiful bathroom, and an updated, retro family room.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Authentic In Athens
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in one of the coolest college towns in the country, Athens, Ga., to find the best breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Atl Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan has just one day to find Atlanta's best deals for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Birmingham Magic
programme.desc: Ali Khan has 12 hours and 35 bucks to find the best deals in Birmingham.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Sin City Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan is on the hunt for breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits an old San Antonio institution given new life by their phenomenal bacon and blue cheese burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City Of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Roger meets two talented chefs who own two spectacular outdoor cooking rigs.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swords and Spits
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking visits chefs using unusual tools over live fires. In Georgia, Roger meets Erik Niel, a chef that loves to break out of his butcher shop to cook outdoors.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Local Legends
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 15 of America's best dishes that have achieved local legend status. From sentimental favorites like deep-dish pizza, patty melts and spaghetti and meatballs to an old-fashioned clambake and lobster roll.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: My Kind Of Town

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Layers of Flavours

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Cleveland gets a second chance at love when he reunites with his high school crush.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: From Bed to Worse
programme.desc: Cleveland and Donna are excited to have the house to themselves when Cleveland Jr. and Roberta go on a school trip to Washington, D.C., but a disgruntled Rallo will do whatever it takes to keep Cleveland and Donna apart.

programme.title: The Office: Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Andy tries to work up the nerve to quit his job and pursue his dreams of stardom. Dwight finally receives his karate black belt from his new sensei and has his best day ever at work.

programme.title: The Office: A.A.R.M.
programme.desc: Jim convinces Dwight that he needs an Assistant to the Assistant Regional Manager, and holds tryouts to find the best candidate.

programme.title: The Office: A.A.R.M.

programme.title: The Office: Finale

programme.title: The Office: The Dundies
programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin employees suffer through the annual office awards ceremony, The Dundies, hosted by their pompous boss Michael Scott at their local watering hole.

programme.title: The Office: Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Just as his best friend Todd Packer visits the office, Michael fears that a new corporate crackdown on sexual harassment will dampen his reputation.

programme.title: The Office: Office Olympics
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight are out of the office for the day as Michael tries to close a deal on a new condo for himself. Meanwhile, Jim and Pam organize an 'Office Olympics' where the staff members compete in ridiculous games.

programme.title: The Office: The Fire
programme.desc: A fire in the kitchen forces the employees of the Dunder Mifflin paper company to the parking lot. To ease everyone's boredom, Jim suggests a game where staff members reveal a little too much information about themselves.

programme.title: The Office: Halloween
programme.desc: Corporate forces Michael to fire someone, putting a damper on the Halloween festivities at Dunder-Mifflin. Jim and Pam put Dwight's resume on job-searching websites, and Jim considers applying for a better job.

programme.title: The Office: The Fight
programme.desc: After Dwight karate punches Michael, Jim organizes a lunchtime rematch at Dwight's dojo where Pam becomes annoyed when Jim gets too friendly with her.

programme.desc: The Wojcik family is in store for another round of surprises.

programme.title: Movie: Seasons of Love
programme.desc: A new romance is thrown for a loop when the man's father passes away. When her ex comes back into the picture, the two struggles to determine what truly matters to them.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Wedding Date
programme.desc: Recently fired from her high-powered job, a woman returns to her small home town to attend the Christmas wedding of an old friend and faces old difficulties.

programme.title: Movie: A Star for Christmas
programme.desc: A cupcakery owner falls for her hunky new customer just in time for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Kristin's Christmas Past
programme.desc: A woman goes to sleep on Christmas Eve and wakes up Christmas morning seventeen years into her past to relive the worst Christmas of her life. She gets a chance to change her imperfect past and her less than perfect future.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: 5-Year Old Vanished
programme.desc: Five-year-old Haleigh Cummings disappears from her home after her dad’s girlfriend puts her to bed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mystery in the Closet
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jessica and Matthew Boynton seemed like the picture-perfect couple until the young mother is found unresponsive and covered in blood inside her locked bedroom closet, and doesn't remember how she ended up there.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Miracle Dog
programme.desc: Paul and Alison Frase were told their child's disorder had no treatment and no cure. Scientists tell them their one hope depends on finding a dog and the right genetic code; they set on a quest to find that one-in-a-million dog.

programme.title: True Crime Live
programme.desc: Mike Galanos puts a spotlight on news and developments in criminal investigations.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Mayan Sacrifice
programme.desc: Luke, a go-getter from Southern California, and Alyssa, a positive survival instructor, take on the rugged coast of the Yucatan. They sruggle to survive dehydration, hunger, and the threat of caiman.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Botswana Breakdown
programme.desc: A Seattle banker and a Rhode Island bartender head to Africa to test their survival skills in the barren plains of Botswana.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Redemption Road
programme.desc: AK, a past survivalist, returns for her chance at redemption. Her partner Jason joins her in tackling the jungle of Guyana, but the two have different priorities. Starvation sets in causing tension to rise. They'll have to come together to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Nicaragua Nightmare
programme.desc: Two survivalists try to survive for 21 days in the hot and swampy jungles of southern Nicaragua armed with only a machete and a roll of duct tape. But an early tap out leaves one of them left to survive alone for 16 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Mountain man Joe, and former cop Andrea take on Namibia. This vast land is home to dangerous predators, including the deadly hippopotamus. But it's her inner demons that threaten Andrea's survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: On the Brink
programme.desc: Naked survivalists are challenged to survive in harsh and dangerous environments.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Six survivalists journey to predator-filled Africa and must fend off lions and hyenas before their 21 days are up.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: A survival instructor and retiree of the armed forces are inserted into the volcano-ravaged island of Montserrat. With completely different survival styles, they find a way to work together, but one accident single-handedly has an eruptive effect on both.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Green Dragon
programme.desc: Josh and Chuck aim to get back on top but circumstances could leave them dead to law. Money threatens to destroy an age-old partnership for Jeff, Mark and Lance. Mark and Digger painstakingly craft a special brew for a high rolling customer.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Big City Bootleg
programme.desc: Josh and Big Chuck go underground to build a new stash site. Mark and Digger venture out of the Smokeys and into the big city for the biggest sale of their careers. Patti and David follow nature's harvest to make a sweet new brew.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Big Wheels Keep on Turning
programme.desc: Mark and Digger bring in a moonshine legend to rev up production. Josh and Chuck turn to an old power source to prolong their operation. Chico and Sondra gear up for their first big sale of the season.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The Green Devil
programme.desc: Jeff and Lance attempt to salvage their absinthe recipe. Mark puts his new partner to the test. Backbreaking labour and a lack of profit threaten to leave Josh up the creek without a paddle or a partner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Thunder Pumpkins
programme.desc: An ingredient has Josh and Chuck ready to quit the biz. Mark and Digger band together with JB to run their signature spirit, but a mishap could send them running. Tim puts his turbo-aged whiskey to the test.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Two Pot Bang Bang
programme.desc: Josh and Chuck struggle to finish winterizing their site. Mark and Digger bring their two-pot still out of retirement. While Mark and Mike have enjoyed a string of successful runs, delivering the goods could land them in the crosshairs of the law.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Collision
programme.desc: Extreme turbulence over the Teton Range threatens disaster for Mike Kennedy, but a second crack at a $3-million Citation V offers Ken Cage and Danny Thompson a shot at redemption.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: We've Got an Emergency Situation
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts hunt down multi-million dollar aircraft from bases throughout the country for repossession. Launching spotters in the field and repo pilots in the cockpit, they risk it all to return luxury planes to their owners.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed and Airborne
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts track down private jets for repossession. Nick enlists his youngest son to gather photo intelligence, which prove crucial in an assignment riddled with unforeseen obstacles.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Spies in the Night
programme.desc: Repo mastermind Mike Kennedy braves a potential suicide mission in California's Central Valley in pursuit of big bucks. Kevin Lacey finds himself, and his 25K payday, at the mercy of a vengeful mechanic and a windy, Colorado night.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo Roulette
programme.desc: Stuntman turned Repo Pilot Mike Kennedy skydives into an airfield to snatch a Dehavilland Twin Otter airplane. Later, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson make a risky two-vehicle snatch from a wealthy playboy.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: No to the Bow
programme.desc: Kayla wants to please her strong-willed mom while shopping for a wedding dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Team Spirit
programme.desc: Bride Mallory is torn between trendy versus conservative, and Lorie has recently lost over 100 pounds but struggles to get comfortable in her new skin.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Extra-Special Day
programme.desc: Adrianna Costa is looking to show off her figure in a sexy dress for her upcoming desert wedding, but her mom has more conservative ideas. Christine hopes to please her outspoken daughters, while still finding a dress that matches her own vision.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Pastor Princess
programme.desc: After two broken engagements, pastor bride Shaundalyn wants to look sexy on her big day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Dare to be Different
programme.desc: Melody wants a fitted black dress, but her mom wants a traditional white gown. Alexa must lower her expectations when she is unable to find a trendy dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Good Things Come to Those Who Wait
programme.desc: With only three months to go until her big day, indecisive bride June is under pressure to find a gown TODAY.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Thumb Sucker/ Bodybuilder
programme.desc: Lauren used to be addicted to drugs and alcohol, but now she's addicted to extreme bodybuilding. Rhonda, 24, can't stop sucking her thumb.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Bathes in Bleach/ Eats Plastic
programme.desc: Kailyn has eaten plastic every day for more than eleven years; Gloria has taken her addiction to bleach to the extreme by bathing in it daily.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Identical Twin Obsession/ Eats Mattresses
programme.desc: Forty-four year old twins Amy and Becky are addicted to being identical, looking alike, acting alike, and even weighing their meals to stay the exact same size. Meanwhile, Jennifer has been addicted to eating mattresses for over 20 years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to Coffee Enemas/ Licks Cats
programme.desc: Trina and her husband, Mike, have done nearly 7,000 coffee enemas over the last two and a half years. Meanwhile, Lisa has been addicted to licking her cat and eating clumps of its hair for three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Pony Play/ Addicted to Drinking Paint
programme.desc: A single mother of two has been addicted to drinking paint for nearly three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to Inflatables/ Butt Injection Addict
programme.desc: Mark has been addicted to his 15 inflatable pool toys, eating, sleeping, and bathing with them. Meanwhile, Karmello has been getting black market butt injections for the last three years.

programme.desc: Tensions settle down as everyone makes up in Florida. Jeremiah and Carmela meet with a specialist to see if they're able to have a baby. Mary throws Sabrina a baby shower, and then Sabrina goes into labour a month early.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: A Mother's Day Surprise
programme.desc: Courtney struggles to split her time between the babies and the older boys. Eric takes on more work to keep up with new expenses. The family attempts their first public outing with the sextuplets on Mother's Day and soon face one of their biggest fears.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: A Whole New Ballgame
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric bring the sextuplets to the twins' baseball game, but the babies quickly become a big distraction. Eric faces a major financial decision about selling the sheep.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: You Think They Are Blood
programme.desc: The recent revelation of a 49-year-old man's adoption has Chris searching for answers to a secret his adoptive parents took to the grave. A bi-racial woman enlists Lisa's help to find her birth family, revealing unfortunate tragedies along the way.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Are They Looking For Me?
programme.desc: Chris and Lisa join forces attempting to solve the childhood mystery of why a woman was separated from her birth family at the age of two. The miraculous journey resolves multiple family mysteries and reveals the most unexpected guest at a family funeral.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Block Party!

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Surprise in Disguise

programme.title: Gypsy Sisters: On the Ranch, Off the Rails!

programme.title: Floribama Shore: To Hunch or to Punch?

programme.title: Tanked!: Tank You Come Again!
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett pay a visit to some old clients. Jeff Tremaine struggles with feeding his eels. A fire at Malibu Winery has damaged their outdoor tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Bill Engvall: Here's Your Tank!
programme.desc: Comedian Bill Engvall requests a Zen-like fish tank for his new office in Hollywood but some firm weight restrictions throw a wrench in their plans. In Vegas, the guys build a tank with fish, lizards and even insects for the home of Penn Jillette.

programme.title: Tanked!: Saved by the Spell
programme.desc: The guys work with Mario Lopez to transform a coin operated 90's video game into an interactive aquarium. Back in Vegas, an illusionist asks the team to build a tank for his latest show.

programme.title: Tanked!: Wilmer's Tank-errama
programme.desc: Actor and producer Wilmer Valderrama asks the guys to build a tank with multiple angles and sides. Then, a health centre in Grand Rapids, Michigan wants a tank to mimic the city's famous rapids.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Tellin' Fish Jokes for the Sheer Halibut
programme.desc: Comedians Gabriel 'Fluffy' Iglesias and Jeff Dunham order up tanks with a sense of humour. Fluffy dreams of transforming a bus into a Hawaiian-themed aquarium, when ventriloquist Jeff is left speechless over his puppet show tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Panama City Beach Tank
programme.desc: The Laketown Wharf resort in Panama City Beach wants a nautical themed fish tank to be the centerpiece of its new restaurant. With a weathered dock look, and colorful sea turtle sculptures this cylindrical tank is bound to make the boys want a vacation.

programme.title: Tanked!: Thumbs Up!
programme.desc: The Thumb is not your ordinary gas station, this one stop shop even sells BBQs and their renovation just won't be complete without a custom fish tank. Wayde and Brett are ready for dessert when Las Vegas' own Donut Bar calls with a plan for a tank.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Tellin' Fish Jokes for the Sheer Halibut
programme.desc: Comedians Gabriel 'Fluffy' Iglesias and Jeff Dunham order up tanks with a sense of humour. Fluffy dreams of transforming a bus into a Hawaiian-themed aquarium, when ventriloquist Jeff is left speechless over his puppet show tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Panama City Beach Tank
programme.desc: The Laketown Wharf resort in Panama City Beach wants a nautical themed fish tank to be the centerpiece of its new restaurant. With a weathered dock look, and colorful sea turtle sculptures this cylindrical tank is bound to make the boys want a vacation.

programme.title: Tanked!: Thumbs Up!
programme.desc: The Thumb is not your ordinary gas station, this one stop shop even sells BBQs and their renovation just won't be complete without a custom fish tank. Wayde and Brett are ready for dessert when Las Vegas' own Donut Bar calls with a plan for a tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Jeff Dunham's Tank for Dummies
programme.desc: Ventriloquist Jeff Dunham wants a theatre-themed tank starring his characters Peanut, Walter and Achmed. The addition of a submerged chandelier gets challenging when Jeff insists it light up.

programme.title: Tanked!: Gabriel Iglesias' Fluffy Tank
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Gabriel 'Fluffy' Iglesias wants a tank for his newly renovated office. Wayde and Brett attempt to combine Gabriel's love of vintage buses into a pair of unique tanks but a grand theft heist at the shop could put on the brakes.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Swimming With Alligators
programme.desc: Steve and Terri and baby Bindi set out for the home of the alligator: America. They travel the bayous of Louisiana and Florida encountering alligators and snapping turtles, and capture and relocate a large male at the Eglin Air Force base in Florida.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Reptiles of the Lost Continent (Madagascar)
programme.desc: A journey into the forests of Madagascar reveals the varied species of chameleons that have evolved in mysterious ways on this ancient island. Steve locates the smallest and largest of this amazing reptile family.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Ice Breaker
programme.desc: Steve Irwin takes us on a frozen adventure to Antarctica to interact with amazing wildlife. He goes tobogganing with penguins, encounters notoriously dangerous leopard seals and swims with two curious humpback whales.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: River of the Dammed
programme.desc: Steve travels to Central America as a guest of the Belize Zoo. Dropped by helicopter into a remote area of the Macal River, Steve tracks down a colony of morelet crocodiles and encounters the venomous fer-de-lance snake.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Whale Sharks of the Wild West
programme.desc: Steve, Terri, and Bindi set out on a luxury cruiser to navigate the rugged coast of Western Australia. On their coastal adventure, they swim with marine animals, dive shipwrecks, and explore islands full of wildlife.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Crocodile Coast
programme.desc: Steve, Terri, and Bindi continue their adventure along Western Australia's coast. They encounter wild crocs in the thick oozy mud of the Kimberley Coast and on a remote reef, Steve dives with sea snakes and hungry sharks.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Best of Steve Irwin: Steve and the Dragon
programme.desc: Steve Irwin comes face-to-face with the largest living lizard in the world, the Komodo dragon, on the remote islands of Indonesia. These huge powerful reptiles seem lazy and docile, most of the time.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Best of Steve Irwin: Crocodiles of the Revolution
programme.desc: In East Timor, the Australian Army discovered two crocodiles living in appalling conditions. Steve and his team from Australia Zoo are called to undertake a death-defying crocodile rescue.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Best of Steve Irwin: Surfing Snakes
programme.desc: Steve and his best mate Wes set out on an adventure through the wild islands of Indonesia looking for the best surf. Both accomplished surfers, the pair encounter some of the more venomous snakes of Indonesia as well as lizards and mischievous monkeys.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Best of Steve Irwin: Reptiles of the Lost Continent
programme.desc: A journey into the forests of Madagascar reveals the varied species of chameleons that have evolved in mysterious ways on this ancient island. Steve locates the smallest and largest of this amazing reptile family.

programme.title: Movie: A Thin Line Between Love and Hate
programme.desc: An uncouth nightclub owner meets his match in a glamorous real estate tycoon.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: In Austin, Texas, a man is shot by someone he trusts and Kim and Audrey must wait until the gunman is apprehended before they can begin treatment.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Police officers Robb and Bethany find themselves in an armed standoff with a suspect who has holed up in an apartment complex. Meanwhile, Fire Rescue team Mayville and Stokes must put out a trailer fire that threatens to incinerate the rest of the park.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Cursed
programme.desc: After grappling with one mishap after another, Tom seeks the help of a voodoo priestess to see if she can cure him.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Full Moon Madness
programme.desc: Detectives try to track down a gang of thieves that are preying on empty camps in the deep bayou.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Grave Robbery
programme.desc: Detectives respond to a cemetery caretaker's complaint of several grave robberies.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Poached
programme.desc: Detectives come up with a creative plan to catch two dangerous alligator poachers red-handed.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Gator Man's Law
programme.desc: Corporal Storm Fitch finds an abandoned car in the marsh just off an eerie and haunted bayou road.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Swamp Manhunt
programme.desc: An armed and dangerous fugitive from another parish tries to make his escape in the swamps.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Murder in Unit 14
programme.desc: An inmate collapses and dies from multiple stab wounds after an altercation inside the cellblock.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Special Delivery
programme.desc: A case that involves cocaine, morphine and a strange love triangle leads the Squad into the community for a street bust.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seeking Out Maple
programme.desc: In the early hours of September 28th, 2011, student Maple Batalia is found shot dead in the parking lot of Simon Fraser University.

programme.title: See No Evil: At Michelle's Door
programme.desc: The News Year's disappearance of Michelle Thornton leads to a gruesome discovery. With no witnesses, only the four security cameras from her apartment building can help decipher what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: Tom and Jill Estes' bodies are found behind a dumpster in Festus, Missouri. Police are baffled, until a receipt leads to CCTV of a blood-stained suspect. A trail of bodies reveals a killer who must be stopped - before he strikes again.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: Shattered: No Way Out
programme.desc: In 1993, a child in need of help leads to a shootout in broad daylight, and an officer down. The gunmen flee the scene, but Alabama police are not about to let them get away.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Through a Child's Eyes
programme.desc: In 1982, 35-year-old JoAnn Tate was stabbed to death in her home in St Louis. Her kids Melissa, 7, and Renee, 4, nearly died. JoAnn's diary revealed a man Melissa ID'd as the attacker. Years later, new memories emerged that changed everyone's lives.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: When Cody MacPherson moves to New Jersey to look for work, he falls in with a new group of friends. After a late night of partying, he disappears without a trace. Six months later, this missing persons investigation soon turns into a homicide.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Cousins Ana Franklin and Jennifer Holliday are traveling home late one night when terror strikes. As Jennifer is taken hostage by an unstable man, she soon connects with a 9-1-1 operator who will stop at nothing to see that Jennifer makes it out alive.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Through a Child's Eyes
programme.desc: In 1982, 35-year-old JoAnn Tate was stabbed to death in her home in St Louis. Her kids Melissa, 7, and Renee, 4, nearly died. JoAnn's diary revealed a man Melissa ID'd as the attacker. Years later, new memories emerged that changed everyone's lives.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: When Cody MacPherson moves to New Jersey to look for work, he falls in with a new group of friends. After a late night of partying, he disappears without a trace. Six months later, this missing persons investigation soon turns into a homicide.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Cousins Ana Franklin and Jennifer Holliday are traveling home late one night when terror strikes. As Jennifer is taken hostage by an unstable man, she soon connects with a 9-1-1 operator who will stop at nothing to see that Jennifer makes it out alive.

programme.title: Shattered: No Way Out
programme.desc: In 1993, a child in need of help leads to a shootout in broad daylight, and an officer down. The gunmen flee the scene, but Alabama police are not about to let them get away.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder In The Poconos
programme.desc: Benjamin Amato and Cheryl Kunkle's May-December becomes complicated when Cheryl becomes pregnant with the couple's child. The former lovers are soon at war in court. But the day before their final custody hearing, a murder changes everything.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: An investigation on the murder of a mother focuses on her violent husband until a jailhouse snitch reveals new information.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: At Death's Door
programme.desc: Lynn and Manfred Schockner are millionaire executives at an aerospace engineering company. But underneath their privilege and wealth lies a twisted rage that ends in a lethal conspiracy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: In a Lonely Place
programme.desc: Michael Dally and Sherri Guess are a perfect match. But when Michael takes up with an alluring colleague named Diana in a not-so-secret affair, the fear of divorce will lead the couple down a dark path of jealousy, abuse, conspiracy… And human sacrifice.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Other Side of the Tracks
programme.desc: When Ed Postma, a Florida truck driver with a bad boy reputation, meets single mom Jackie Rosser, sparks fly. But when Ed straightens out to become a family man, new bad boys are waiting, and the spark dies, taking another casualty as collateral damage.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Second Best
programme.desc: Being the 'other woman' is a lonely life. Some turn rejection into rage. A call girl craved the high life, a teen mom eradicated her rival, and a lesbian love affair ripped a family apart. These Deadly Women refused to play 'Second Best'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: Love is usually a game for two -- when three try to play, somebody will lose out. An obsessed wife fixates on revenge, a lustful affair breeds a wicked plot, and a wealthy housewife hides more than skeletons in her closet.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Scorned
programme.desc: Love brings hope and happiness, but broken hearts can leave a trail of blood and tears. When lovers and friends dump these women, they take the ultimate revenge. These Deadly Women prove hell hath no fury like a woman 'Scorned.'

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: High School Homicide
programme.desc: In 1989, high school student Amy Weidner is brutally murdered while she stays home sick from school.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Brute Force
programme.desc: In rural Kentucky, a young woman is found dead in the trunk of her car. The search for her killer unearths a deadly web of buried secrets in this seemingly idyllic community.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Knives and Lies
programme.desc: When a well-liked teenage boy is found stabbed to death in his Salt Lake City, UT home, detectives leave no stone unturned in their quest to solve the murder that rocked this normally tranquil town.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: No Good Deed
programme.desc: In 2005, a 28 year-old photographer and college student is found murdered in his Arlington, Texas apartment. Investigators suspect that the victim's generosity and willingness to help those in need may have lead a killer to his door.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.
